untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition of pullback structure (simple vs complex), resumption attempt detection, and second-leg failure confirmation. These require multi-candle structural analysis beyond point-in-time indicator comparisons. Threshold values for pullback confirmation periods and complex pullback confirmation candles are marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and cannot be quantified without domain expertise. Early entry on pattern initiation requires sequence recognition not expressible with standard OHLCV indicators and allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted basic proxy: entry on close above previous low (simple pullback), entry on close below previous high (complex pullback continuation). Exit on reversal. However, this does not capture the nuanced pattern recognition required: identifying pullback bottoms, confirming failed resumptions, detecting second-leg failures, or the no-confirmation-required entry timing. The signal is fundamentally pattern-recognition based and requires either: (1) custom pattern detection functions, (2) machine learning classification, or (3) explicit multi-candle sequence rules with specific threshold parameters currently undefined.
